title: H-Ai-Nikr-Agi squabble log rotation not in ReportRetention -- add logs/hanikragi-squabble.enc to rotation
description: H-Ai-Nikr-Agi writes encrypted entries to logs/hanikragi-squabble.enc without any rotation or size cap. Over time this risks unbounded growth (SIN-SS-001). Add squabble.enc to the Invoke-ReportRetention script or Invoke-HistoryRotation so entries older than N days are pruned/archived. Consider adding a MaxEntries cap to H-Ai-Nikr-Agi.psm1 (like PwShGUI-ConvoVault's MaxConvoEntries=200).
notes: SIN-SS-001: File size growth >51% since last baseline is a penance warning. Rolling cap of 200 entries is the recommended pattern (see PwShGUI-ConvoVault.psm1 $script:MaxConvoEntries).
